title: Eevee's Flying Horses
description: Have You Ever Wished Your Minecraft Horses Could Fly? Well Now You Can And More With This Mod.
body:
By Naming Your Horse **Pegasus** Or **Alicorn** Your Horse Will Fall Slower And You Can Hold R Well Riding To Stop Falling. By Naming Your Horse **Unicorn** Or **Alicorn** You Can Press F Well Riding Them For Them To Shoot A Harming Potion Or G To Shoot A Healing Potion. And Naming Your Horse **Hell Horse** It Will Have A Fire Immunity And By Holding Down It Will Create A Fire Trail.

 
It's Also Recommded To Play This Mod With [Fishy's Magic Horses](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fishys-magic-horses) Resource Pack.


And To Anyone Asking "Can I Use This Mod In My Modpack?" Yes. Just Please (If You Can) Post It On Curseforge Or Link It In The Curseforge Comments. =3
